summary: The batch of synthetic samples demonstrates a comprehensive coverage of all attribute values, but there are instances of near-duplicate phrasings and some missing edge cases. The diversity is generally good, but further refinement is needed to enhance uniqueness.
recommendations: Encourage more varied emotional expressions to reduce overrepresentation of the emotional style.
Introduce more scenarios that reflect rare or edge cases to enhance diversity.
Ensure that the phrasing of requests is distinct to minimize near-duplicate instances.
